title: bidens perianthomega
intro: Bidens perianthomega, also known as the sticky joey or sticky joey bedstraw, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Bidens perianthomega include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Bidens perianthomega can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
